user_inputs: [INST] Give me a concise description for the format of ffmpeg command in one line. [/INST]
generated_texts: ' The format of an ffmpeg command is `ffmpeg [global_options] {[input_file_options] -i input_url} {[output_file_options] output_url} ...`, where global options apply to all inputs/outputs, input options are specific to each input file, output options are specific to each output file, and input and output urls specify the input and output files or streams.'
